texto: We talk about a free press. These people hide, they make a lot of money off the media. They hide behind the slogans of free press, and then they can come out with crap like that. It's just garbage. It's insulting to the readers.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Robert Scheer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a negocios. O trecho “We talk about a free press. These people hide, they make a lot of money off the media. They hide …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que negocios, media, free pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de free e people.
